summary: Comprehensive testing of BidBlitz Gaming Platform. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ GamePlatform.jsx properly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
✓ All game cards have data-testid attributes for testing
✓ Category filtering works correctly for all 6 categories (Alle, Puzzle, Arcade, Tycoon, Strategy, 3D Games)
✓ Games open in iframe with proper close functionality
✓ Static HTML games are properly organized in /games/[category]/ subdirectories
✓ Backend API properly excludes MongoDB _id from responses
✓ Score submission calculates rewards correctly (10% of score, capped at max_reward)
✓ Leaderboard aggregation works with proper ranking
seed_data_creation: None - using existing game data from MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gaming Platform fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_games_api.py cover all CRUD operations, categories, score submission, and leaderboard. Frontend tests verified category filtering, game iframe loading, and close functionality.

backend_apis.GET /api/games: PASS - Returns list of games with proper structure
backend_apis.GET /api/games/{id}: PASS - Returns game by ID or slug
backend_apis.POST /api/games/score: PASS - Submits score and calculates reward

frontend_features.category_buttons: PASS - All 6 categories (Alle, Puzzle, Arcade, Tycoon, Strategy, 3D Games)
frontend_features.category_filtering: PASS - Filters games by category correctly
frontend_features.game_cards: PASS - 29 game cards with thumbnails and rewards
frontend_features.close_button: PASS - Close button returns to game list

mocked_apis_note: None - All APIs are real backend endpoints with MongoDB integration
